ruins_page.title: Ruins' Rhapsody
ruins_page.subtitle: A cinematic Action-Adventure framework built with C++ and MetaHuman technology.

about.title: The Quest for the Lost Heart
desc: Step into the boots of Alessandra Morioka, a daring archaeologist on a mission to uncover the Lost Heart of Arachne.
Originally developed as a academy thesis and later expanded into a full technical demo,
this project showcases a high-end third-person framework.
Inspired by classics like Tomb Raider, it bridges the gap between cinematic storytelling and rigorous software engineering.

gameplay.title: Immersive Gameplay Features
items: • Advanced Traversal: A multi-modal movement system including climbing, ledge navigation, and dynamic sliding.
• Environmental Interaction: Complex puzzle-solving using key-door mechanics and inventory-based triggers.
• Tactical Combat: Encounter diverse AI threats (animals, robots, humans) with modular weapon systems and ammunition management.
• Exploration: Three distinct atmospheric zones: Ancient Temple, Underground Cave with a lake, and Open Ruins.

tech.title: Core Architecture (C++)
items: • Component-Based Logic: Custom C++ components for Climbing, Swimming (with breath resistance), and Inventory management.
• Level Streaming: Implementation of a persistent world with sub-level streaming to eliminate loading screens and optimize memory.
• AI Perception: Enemies utilize custom Sensing Components and Behavior Trees for realistic detection and combat states.
• Custom Collision: Specialized ECC Trace Channels for high-precision shooting, climbing detection, and fluid interactions.

systems.title: Optimization & UX
items: • Save/Load Pipeline: A robust serialization system tracking sub-level states, player progression, and inventory persistence.
• Localisation: Built-in translation framework with runtime toggle between English and Italian.
• Interactive UI: 3D Main Menu widgets integrated into the game environment with layered ambient audio design.
• Performance: Extensive profiling and asset optimization (texture resizing, mesh cleaning) to maintain 60+ FPS on Windows.

codemap_desc: Foundational software map designed during the thesis phase. It illustrates the core logic and class interactions that serve as the project's backbone.
View full-res Technical PDF
gallery.components_desc: Breakdown of custom C++ components (Climb, Swim, Inventory) extending the MetaHuman base for a reusable traversal framework.
gallery.input_desc: Scalable control scheme using UE5 Data Assets to manage traversal, combat, and interaction actions.
gallery.ai_desc: Configuration for enemy sensing, procedural loot systems, and visual feedback through Niagara VFX.
gallery.bt_desc: Logic flow featuring 3 main states: Autonomous Patrol, Player Chasing, and Ranged Combat with cooldown management.

cta.title: Ready to explore?
cta.subtitle: Download the demo (~1.5 GB) and experience the technical framework in action.
